summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Suporte (Support Ticket) System for Transmill Platform. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests verified successfully including franchise user creating chamados, master admin responding, and status updates.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Backend suporte.py correctly implements JWT authentication with get_user_from_token dependency
✅ Master users correctly identified via user_type='master' OR is_master_account OR is_labelview_master flags
✅ Franchise users can only see their own chamados (filtered by franquia_slug or criador_id)
✅ Master users can see ALL chamados from all franchises
✅ Status transitions work correctly: aberto → em_andamento → aguardando_resposta → resolvido → fechado
✅ When master responds, status auto-changes to 'aguardando_resposta'
✅ When franchise responds to 'aguardando_resposta', status changes to 'em_andamento'
✅ Master correctly cannot create chamados (403 Forbidden)
✅ Frontend SuportePage.js has proper data-testid attributes for testing
✅ Frontend AdminFranquiasPanel.js includes SuporteMasterPanel component with full functionality
✅ Menu 'Suporte' option correctly appears in MinimalistHomePage dropdown for franchise users
seed_data_creation: Created test chamados during testing: TEST_Chamado_*, UI_TEST_Chamado_Automatizado
context_for_next_testing_agent: Suporte (Support Ticket) system fully tested and working. Backend endpoints: POST /api/suporte/chamados (create), GET /api/suporte/chamados (list), GET /api/suporte/chamados/{id} (details), POST /api/suporte/chamados/{id}/mensagens (add message), PATCH /api/suporte/chamados/{id}/status (update status). Frontend pages: /suporte for franchise users, /admin/franquias with Suporte tab for master admin. All CRUD operations verified. Status workflow verified. Permission checks verified.

backend_tests.description: Franchise user can create support ticket
Franchise user can list their own tickets
Franchise user can get ticket details
Franchise user can add message to ticket
Franchise user can filter tickets by status
Master admin can list all tickets from all franchises
Master admin can get any ticket details
Master admin can respond to tickets
Master admin can update ticket status
Master admin can mark ticket as resolved

frontend_tests.description: Login page loads with dark green #293618 background
Suporte option visible in dropdown menu for franchise users
/suporte page loads with stats cards and chamados list
Modal opens with form fields (titulo, categoria, prioridade, descricao)
Chamado created successfully with toast notification
Stats cards update after creating chamado
Master admin can login and access /admin/franquias
Suporte tab visible in admin panel
Master can see all chamados from all franchises
Master can open chamado details modal
Master can respond to chamado with message
Status changes to 'Aguardando Resposta' after master responds

features_verified.GET /api/suporte/chamados: ✅ PASS - List chamados (franchise sees own, master sees all)
features_verified.Frontend Admin Suporte tab: ✅ PASS - Master admin support panel working
features_verified.Menu Suporte option: ✅ PASS - Suporte option in franchise user dropdown menu
